name: The Reaper || H-48XA
description:
A conceptual spacecraft counterpart to Mihaly, from Ace Combat 7.

You, alongside a sizeable fleet of frigates, destroyers, cruisers, and even two dreadnoughts, are sent on a mission to take down an enemy fortress. You can choose any ship you want; a small gunboat, a medical ship (Reaper will not attack you), a high-tech experimental fighter, a planet-sized black-hole ship of mega-destruction and system-wide annihilation... anything, as long as you are in a ship.

The mission was going pretty smoothly, with the rest of the fleet taking out enemy destroyers and frigates with relative ease. A few cruisers appeared, but the dreadnoughts took care of them.

And then comes the Reaper.

H-48XA

An experimental fighter equipped with a high-powered pulse laser with destructive capabilities comparable to that of a railgun, except its cooldown period is much shorter. An improvement to the H-48SA and an extension of the original Solivan H-48X model, this aircraft has much better maneuverability, 360-degree lock, interchangeable missile ports to carry all sorts of missiles, as well as a new, experimental five-dimensional warp technology dubbed the "real-complex warp machine". The H-48XA is able to warp to different parts of spacetime wherever it wants to instantly, although the ability does have limited energy and must cool down for some time before being used again. This aircraft is capable of Stage 2 Stealth, meaning that it is almost impossible to detect from more than 300 kilometers away, and locks with standard missiles cannot be achieved unless it is less than 5 kilometers away.

H-49Sv2

The H-49Sv2 is a more offensive-focused version of the H-49S. It still has its support role of being capable of carrying laser pods on its wings in order to guide allied missiles to their targets, but its thrusters and wings were modified to give it much better maneuverability. Like most fighter vessels (including the H-48XA), the H-49Sv2 has an autocannon and plasma cannon for varying ranges of close quarters dogfights and combat with other spacecraft.

In this bot, you will be taking on an extremely powerful adversary, as well as their two accomplices. Obelisk 1, better known by his nickname Reaper, is a part of the three-man squadron revered for its excellent pilots named Obelisk Squadron. Their piloting skills and cooperativeness make them great candidates for a terrorist organization called The Cult of Artificiality to train their AI fighters on, eventually planning to mass-produce autonomous fighters that are practically exact copies of the Reaper.

But it seems that the Reaper doesn't like the idea of his hard-earned skill being so easily exploited and replicated...
